column1: # Golden corpus — the executable spec of grammar v1 (Italian).
# Format: space-separated tokens "lemma:POS" <TAB> expected DEFAULT candidate.
# "CONCAT" means: no pattern may match — the only candidate is the concat fallback.
# Change lines only with linguistic justification in the PR (docs/grammar-v1.md).
# --- presente indicativo, S-V, all six persons -------------------------------
# --- pro-drop default: no subject -> first person, no pronoun ----------------

column2: io voglio mangiare la pizza grande

column1: # --- unsupported object noun: citation form, never a guessed article ------------
# --- regressions: adversarial review 2026-07-13 (must stay CONCAT / correct) ------
# intransitive verb + place noun needs a preposition we don't build ("vado a casa")
# object governed by an intransitive infinitive
# 'non' before a noun subject must not be silently relocated
# adjective before the object noun (out of order) must not re-attach
# essere is intransitive: predicate nominative "io sono la pizza" is out of scope
# masculine 'uovo' (data-bug regression): agreement and article must be masculine
# --- out-of-scope input degrades to concat, never throws, never drops words -----
# noun subjects are realized grammatically even when semantically odd — the engine has
# no animacy data and never guesses; the user cycles or picks the concat alternative.
